name: amplify
description: A set of tools and services to help front-end web and mobile developers build scalable full stack applications

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Initializes a new project, sets up deployment resources in the cloud, and makes your project ready for Amplify

subcommands.name: configure
subcommands.description: Configures the attributes of your project for amplify-cli, such as switching front-end framework and adding/removing cloud-provider plugins

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.description: Provisions cloud resources with the latest local developments

subcommands.name: --y
subcommands.description: Respond 'y' to all options

subcommands.name: pull
subcommands.description: Fetch upstream backend environment definition changes from the cloud and updates the local environment to match that definition

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.description: Executes amplify push, and then builds and publishes client-side application for hosting

subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.description: Executes amplify push, and then executes the project's start command to test run the client-side application locally

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Shows the state of local resources not yet pushed to the cloud (Create/Update/Delete)

subcommands.name: -v
subcommands.description: Shows the detailed verbose diff between local and deployed resources, including cloudformation-diff

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Deletes all of the resources tied to the project from the cloud

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Adds a resource for an Amplify category in your local backend

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update resource for an Amplify category in your local backend

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Removes a resource for an Amplify category in your local backend

subcommands.name: mock
subcommands.description: Run mock server for testing categories locally

subcommands.name: codegen
subcommands.description: Generates GraphQL statements(queries, mutations and eventHandlers) and type annotations

subcommands.name: console
subcommands.description: Opens the web console for the selected cloud resource

subcommands.name: logout
subcommands.description: If using temporary cloud provider credentials, this logs out of the account

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.description: Display all commands available for new Amplify project

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Adds a new environment

subcommands.name: pull
subcommands.description: Pulls the current env from the cloud

subcommands.name: checkout
subcommands.description: Switches to selected environment

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Displays a list of all the environments

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Displays the environment details

subcommands.name: import
subcommands.description: Imports an environment

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Removes an environment
